# thoth_browser_providers (Data Source)

Reads configured browser providers for the tenant.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `data_json` (String) Browser provider rows as JSON array.
- `total` (Number) Total providers returned.
